query:
SELECT plan, status, COUNT(*) as count FROM subscriptions GROUP BY plan, status;
SELECT COUNT(*) as menu_plans_count FROM menu_plans;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3J5KDBVUjsrxvHe.root --database cX9NcQmb35cA4KMDW3eQdK --execute SELECT plan, status, COUNT(*) as count FROM subscriptions GROUP BY plan, status;
SELECT COUNT(*) as menu_plans_count FROM menu_plans;
